title: athyrium dulongicola
intro: Athyrium dulongicola, also known as Dulong Fern, is a species of fern in the Athyrium genus. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Athyrium dulongicola is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, but its effectiveness and safety for consumption have not been extensively scientifically studied.
